reason: CurrentPenalty is a scalar penalty wrapper; no new hot-path production kernel is introduced. The strict-transfer-guard fix touches a 0-D / 2-vector pure path. Distance wrappers (CurveCurveDistance, CurveSurfaceDistance, MinCurveCurveDistance) already used JAX cullers and chunked pairwise reductions in the parent commit; no new production-scale kernel was added in item 01.

production_scale_floor.nquadpoints_note: CurrentPenalty is a scalar penalty per current; nquadpoints is not applicable. Distance kernels are exercised at nquadpoints>=64 by the cited single-stage and non-banana production fixtures.

dense_materialization_budget.current_penalty: scalar float64 in pure wrapper and float64[16] in vmap'd production-scale fixture
dense_materialization_budget.curve_distance_chunked_path: chunk_size * chunk_size pairwise block plus masks and weights

validation.command: JAX_ENABLE_X64=True JAX_PLATFORMS=cpu .conda/jax-0.9.2/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/geo/test_distance_jax.py tests/geo/test_curve_objectives.py -k 'distance_jax or pairwise_penalty_chunking_matches_dense_paths or curve_surface_chunked_gradient_respects_strict_transfer_guard or curve_surface_dense_path_respects_strict_transfer_guard or curve_surface_chunked_path_does_not_materialize_dense_matrix or pairwise_penalty_chunking_preserves_infeasible_barrier_inf or pairwise_penalty_chunking_preserves_finite_zero_penalty_gradients or pairwise_penalty_accepts_explicit_row_sharding or pairwise_penalty_chunking_is_strict_transfer_safe'

JAX_ENABLE_X64=True JAX_PLATFORMS=cpu .conda/jax-0.9.2/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/test_jax_import_smoke.py -k 'pairwise_penalty_accepts_explicit_row_sharding or pairwise_curve_penalty_pure_functions or legacy_curve_objective_values or legacy_curve_objective_gradients'
